response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned polyglot engineer with genuine staff-level tenure and solid TypeScript/Node.js depth, but the role demands 8+ years of production AI experience and the resume shows only ~6 months of tangential AI-adjacent work (MCP tooling at re:cinq). Core requirements — RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, multi-agent frameworks, and Python — are either absent or undemonstrated. The candidate is currently in a career gap, and the AI exposure visible on the resume is insufficient for a staff-level GenAI forward-deployment role.
strengths: Direct MCP (Model Context Protocol) implementation experience at re:cinq aligns with a listed key technology
Genuine staff-level track record across multiple companies with customer-facing and mentorship responsibilities
Hands-on AWS CDK and cloud infrastructure delivery experience at Optilyz
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the skills list and employment history, despite being a primary required language
No demonstrated experience with RAG, vector databases, LLM evaluation, or multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI, etc.)
AI/GenAI exposure is limited to approximately 6 months and described at a high level, far short of the 8-year production AI requirement
